ideation: This animation sequence aims to depict a protective and loving embrace, reflecting the familial bond represented by the emoji. The robot will use both arms to create a gentle, encompassing gesture.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the warmth of the embrace. Frame 1 starts with both arms slightly raised and angled outward, palms facing upward, as if preparing to enfold someone. Frame 2 depicts the arms moving inward, wrapping around in a hug, with a slight downward pitch. Frame 3 shows the arms holding the hug, with a slight inward rotation to emphasize the closeness of the embrace. Frame 4 shows the arms slowly returning to a more relaxed position, but still maintaining a sense of closeness and warmth.

frames.beat: arms open wide, ready to embrace
arms draw inward, beginning the loving hug
holding the embrace close, a warm connection
arms relax slightly, the hug lingers warmly
